set; }\n        public DbSet<Trip> Trips { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Destination> Destinations { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Activity> Activities { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Accommodation> Accommodations { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Transport> Transports { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Review> Reviews { get; set; }\n\n        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n        {\n            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n            // Configure relationships if needed beyond data annotations\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Trip>()\n                .HasOne(t => t.User)\n                .WithMany(u => u.Trips)\n                .HasForeignKey(t => t.UserId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Destination>()\n                .HasOne(d => d.Trip)\n                .WithMany(t => t.Destinations)\n                .HasForeignKey(d => d.TripId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Activity>()\n                .HasOne(a => a.Destination)\n                .WithMany(d => d.Activities)\n                .HasForeignKey(a => a.DestinationId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Accommodation>()\n                .HasOne(a => a.Destination)\n                .WithMany(d => d.Accommodations)\n                .HasForeignKey(a => a.DestinationId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Transport>()\n                .HasOne(t => t.Destination)\n                .WithMany(d => d.Transports)\n                .HasForeignKey(t => t.DestinationId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Review>()\n                .HasOne(r => r.User)\n                .WithMany(u => u.Reviews)\n                .HasForeignKey(r => r.UserId);\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Review>()\n                .HasOne(r => r.Destination)\n                .WithMany(d => d.Reviews)\n                .HasForeignKey(r => r.DestinationId);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01FNrMoZsQ2i1xnNvrQfYz3Z__vscode-1778152251905","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana"}

          [DestinationId] int NOT NULL,
          CONSTRAINT [PK_Reviews] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
          CONSTRAINT [FK_Reviews_Destinations_DestinationId] FOREIGN KEY ([DestinationId]) REFERENCES [Destinations] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
          CONSTRAINT [FK_Reviews_Users_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [Users] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
      );
Failed executing DbCommand (7ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='Text', CommandTimeout='30']
CREATE TABLE [Reviews] (
    [Id] int NOT NULL IDENTITY,
    [Rating] int NOT NULL,
    [Comment] nvarchar(1000) NULL,
    [UserId] int NOT NULL,
    [DestinationId] int NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Reviews] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Reviews_Destinations_DestinationId] FOREIGN KEY ([DestinationId]) REFERENCES [Destinations] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Reviews_Users_UserId] FOREIGN KEY ([UserId]) REFERENCES [Users] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

Tables\n+\n+### Users\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `FirstName`\n+- `LastName`\n+- `Email`\n+\n+### Trips\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `Name`\n+- `StartDate`\n+- `EndDate`\n+- `UserId` (FK -> Users)\n+\n+### Destinations\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `City`\n+- `Country`\n+- `Description`\n+- `TripId` (FK -> Trips)\n+\n+### Activities\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `Name`\n+- `TypeOfActivity`\n+- `Date`\n+- `Cost`\n+- `DestinationId` (FK -> Destinations)\n+\n+### Accommodations\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `Name`\n+- `Type`\n+- `Address`\n+- `CostPerNight`\n+- `CheckInDate`\n+- `CheckOutDate`\n+- `DestinationId` (FK -> Destinations)\n+\n+### Transports\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `Type`\n+- `Cost`\n+- `DepartureTime`\n+- `ArrivalTime`\n+- `DestinationId` (FK -> Destinations)\n+\n+### Reviews\n+- `Id` (PK)\n+- `Rating`\n+- `Comment`\n+- `UserId` (FK -> Users)\n+- `DestinationId` (FK -> Destinations)\n+\n+## Relationships\n+\n+- One `User` has many `Trips`.\n+- One `Trip` has many `Destinations`.\n+- One `Destination` has many `Activities`.\n+- One `Destination` has many `Accommodations`.\n+- One `Destination` has many `Transports`.\n+- One `Destination` has many `Reviews`.\n+- One `User` has many `Reviews`.\n+\n+## Derived / Computed Fields\n+\n+- `Trip.TotalCost`\n+- `Destination.TotalDestinationCost`\n+- `Accommodation.NumberOfNights`\n+- `Accommodation.TotalCost`\n+-   _context = context;\n        }\n\n        private string GenerateSlug(string text)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return \"\";\n            var slug = Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n            slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n            return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n        }\n\n Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n            slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n            return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n        }\n\n _context.Activities\n                .Include(a => a.Destination)\n                    .ThenInclude(d => d.Trip)\n                .ToList()\n                .FirstOrDefault(a => a.TypeOfActivity.ToString().ToLower() == activityType.ToLower() && \n                                      GenerateSlug(a.Name) == activityName.ToLower());\n\n            if (item == null) return AccommodationsController(AppDbContext context)\n        {\n            _context = context;\n        }\n\n        private string GenerateSlug(string text)\n        {\n            if         var reviews = _context.Reviews\n                .Include(r => r.User)\n                .Include(r => r.Destination)\n                .Where(r => r.Rating >= 4)\n                .OrderByDescending(r => r.Rating)\n                .ThenByDescending(r => r.Id)\n                .ToList();\n\n            return View(\"Index\", reviews);\n        }\n\n        [HttpGet(\"NeedsImprovements\")]\n        public IActionResult NeedsImprovements()\n        {\n            var reviews = _context.Reviews\n                .Include(r => r.User)\n                .Include(r => r.Destination)\n                .Where(r => r.Rating < 4)\n                .OrderBy(r => r.Rating)\n                .ThenByDescending(r => r.Id)\n                .ToList();\n\n {"timestamp":"2026-05-07T15:09:14.898Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"a4df2dcc-993d-4fc1-bfe9-e2c0bcc6ecbb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\9e2d08ccc15ca89521ce4530222539be\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\a4df2dcc-993d-4fc1-bfe9-e2c0bcc6ecbb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana\\Views\\Trips\\Details.cshtml","oldString":"@model projektLana.Trip\n@using projektLana.Data\n@{ \n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Trip Details\"; \n\n    var events = new List<(DateTime Date, DateTime ExactTime, string Type, string Title, string Desc, string Icon, decimal Cost, string Controller, int Id)>();\n\n    foreach(var dest in Model.Destinations) {\n        // Activities\n        foreach(var act in dest.Activities) {\n            events.Add((act.Date.Date, act.Date, \"Activity\", act.Name, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), \"bi-ticket-detailed-fill\", act.Cost, \"Activities\", act.Id));\n        }\n        foreach(var trans in dest.Transports) {\n            string transIcon = trans.Type switch {\n                TransportType.Airplane => \"bi-airplane-fill\",\n                TransportType.Bus => \"bi-bus-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Train => \"bi-train-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Car => \"bi-car-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Ferry => \"bi-water\",\n                _ => \"bi-send-fill\"\n            };\n            events.Add((trans.DepartureTime.Date, trans.DepartureTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Departure - {dest.City}\", $\"Departs at {trans.DepartureTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, trans.Cost, \"Transports\", trans.Id));\n            events.Add((trans.ArrivalTime.Date, trans.ArrivalTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Arrival - {dest.City}\", $\"Arrives at {trans.ArrivalTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, 0m, \"Transports\", trans.Id));\n        }\n        // Accommodations (Check-in and Check-out)\n        foreach(var acc in dest.Accommodations) {\n            events.Add((acc.CheckInDate.Date, acc.CheckInDate, \"Stay Check-in\", acc.Name, acc.Type.ToString(), \"bi-door-open-fill\", acc.CostPerNight, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id));\n            events.Add((acc.CheckOutDate.Date, acc.CheckOutDate, \"Stay Check-out\", acc.Name, \"Departure\", \"bi-door-closed-fill\", 0m, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id));\n        }\n    }\n\n    var groupedEvents = events.OrderBy(e => e.ExactTime).GroupBy(e => e.Date).ToList();\n\n    var tripReviews = MockRepository.Reviews\n        .Where(r => r.User?.Id == Model.User?.Id && Model.Destinations.Any(d => d.Id == r.Destination?.Id))\n        .ToList();\n}","newString":"@model projektLana.Trip\n@using projektLana.Data\n@using System.Text.RegularExpressions;\n@{ \n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Trip Details\";\n    \n    string GenerateSlug(string text)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return \"\";\n        var slug = Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n        slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n        return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n    }\n\n    var events = new List<(DateTime Date, DateTime ExactTime, string Type, string Title, string Desc, string Icon, decimal Cost, string Controller, int Id, string SlugParam1, string SlugParam2, object EntityObject)>();\n\n    foreach(var dest in Model.Destinations) {\n        // Activities\n        foreach(var act in dest.Activities) {\n            events.Add((act.Date.Date, act.Date, \"Activity\", act.Name, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), \"bi-ticket-detailed-fill\", act.Cost, \"Activities\", act.Id, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), GenerateSlug(act.Name), act));\n        }\n        foreach(var trans in dest.Transports) {\n            string transIcon = trans.Type switch {\n                TransportType.Airplane => \"bi-airplane-fill\",\n                TransportType.Bus => \"bi-bus-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Train => \"bi-train-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Car => \"bi-car-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Ferry => \"bi-water\",\n                _ => \"bi-send-fill\"\n            };\n            events.Add((trans.DepartureTime.Date, trans.DepartureTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Departure - {dest.City}\", $\"Departs at {trans.DepartureTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, trans.Cost, \"Transports\", trans.Id, \"\", \"\", trans));\n            events.Add((trans.ArrivalTime.Date, trans.ArrivalTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Arrival - {dest.City}\", $\"Arrives at {trans.ArrivalTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, 0m, \"Transports\", trans.Id, \"\", \"\", trans));\n        }\n        // Accommodations (Check-in and Check-out)\n        foreach(var acc in dest.Accommodations) {\n            events.Add((acc.CheckInDate.Date, acc.CheckInDate, \"Stay Check-in\", acc.Name, acc.Type.ToString(), \"bi-door-open-fill\", acc.CostPerNight, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id, acc.Type.ToString(), GenerateSlug(acc.Name), acc));\n            events.Add((acc.CheckOutDate.Date, acc.CheckOutDate, \"Stay Check-out\", acc.Name, \"Departure\", \"bi-door-closed-fill\", 0m, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id, acc.Type.ToString(), GenerateSlug(acc.Name), acc));\n        }\n    }\n\n    var groupedEvents = events.OrderBy(e => e.ExactTime).GroupBy(e => e.Date).ToList();\n\n    var tripReviews = MockRepository.Reviews\n        .Where(r => r.User?.Id == Model.User?.Id && Model.Destinations.Any(d => d.Id == r.Destination?.Id))\n        .ToList();\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01KjwZhYcsWqK2japnu7mYSG__vscode-1778152252002","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana"}

events.Add((act.Date.Date, act.Date, \"Activity\", act.Name, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), \"bi-ticket-detailed-fill\", act.Cost, \"Activities\", act.Id));\n        }\n        foreach(var trans in dest.Transports) {\n            string transIcon = trans.Type switch {\n                TransportType.Airplane => \"bi-airplane-fill\",\n                TransportType.Bus => \"bi-bus-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Train => \"bi-train-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Car => \"bi-car-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Ferry => \"bi-water\",\n                _ => \"bi-send-fill\"\n            };\n            events.Add((trans.DepartureTime.Date, trans.DepartureTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Departure - {dest.City}\", $\"Departs at {trans.DepartureTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, trans.Cost, \"Transports\", trans.Id));\n            events.Add((trans.ArrivalTime.Date, trans.ArrivalTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Arrival - {dest.City}\", $\"Arrives at {trans.ArrivalTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, 0m, \"Transports\", trans.Id));\n        }\n        // Accommodations (Check-in and Check-out)\n        foreach(var acc in dest.Accommodations) {\n            events.Add((acc.CheckInDate.Date, acc.CheckInDate, \"Stay Check-in\", acc.Name, acc.Type.ToString(), \"bi-door-open-fill\", acc.CostPerNight, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id));\n            events.Add((acc.CheckOutDate.Date, acc.CheckOutDate, \"Stay Check-out\", acc.Name, \"Departure\", \"bi-door-closed-fill\", 0m, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id));\n        }\n    }\n\n    var groupedEvents = events.OrderBy(e => e.ExactTime).GroupBy(e => e.Date).ToList();\n\n    var tripReviews = MockRepository.Reviews\n        .Where(r => r.User?.Id == Model.User?.Id && Model.Destinations.Any(d => d.Id == r.Destination?.Id))\n        .ToList();\n}","newString":"@model projektLana.Trip\n@using projektLana.Data\n@using System.Text.RegularExpressions;\n@{ \n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Trip Details\";\n    \n    string GenerateSlug(string text)\n    {\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return \"\";\n        var slug = Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n        slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n        return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n    }\n\n    var events = new List<(DateTime Date, DateTime ExactTime, string Type, string Title, string Desc, string Icon, decimal Cost, string Controller, int Id, string SlugParam1, string SlugParam2, object EntityObject)>();\n\n    foreach(var dest in Model.Destinations) {\n        // Activities\n        foreach(var act in dest.Activities) {\n            events.Add((act.Date.Date, act.Date, \"Activity\", act.Name, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), \"bi-ticket-detailed-fill\", act.Cost, \"Activities\", act.Id, act.TypeOfActivity.ToString(), GenerateSlug(act.Name), act));\n        }\n        foreach(var trans in dest.Transports) {\n            string transIcon = trans.Type switch {\n                TransportType.Airplane => \"bi-airplane-fill\",\n                TransportType.Bus => \"bi-bus-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Train => \"bi-train-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Car => \"bi-car-front-fill\",\n                TransportType.Ferry => \"bi-water\",\n                _ => \"bi-send-fill\"\n            };\n            events.Add((trans.DepartureTime.Date, trans.DepartureTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Departure - {dest.City}\", $\"Departs at {trans.DepartureTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, trans.Cost, \"Transports\", trans.Id, \"\", \"\", trans));\n            events.Add((trans.ArrivalTime.Date, trans.ArrivalTime, \"Transport\", $\"{trans.Type} Arrival - {dest.City}\", $\"Arrives at {trans.ArrivalTime:HH:mm}\", transIcon, 0m, \"Transports\", trans.Id, \"\", \"\", trans));\n        }\n        // Accommodations (Check-in and Check-out)\n        foreach(var acc in dest.Accommodations) {\n            events.Add((acc.CheckInDate.Date, acc.CheckInDate, \"Stay Check-in\", acc.Name, acc.Type.ToString(), \"bi-door-open-fill\", acc.CostPerNight, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id, acc.Type.ToString(), GenerateSlug(acc.Name), acc));\n            events.Add((acc.CheckOutDate.Date, acc.CheckOutDate, \"Stay Check-out\", acc.Name, \"Departure\", \"bi-door-closed-fill\", 0m, \"Accommodations\", acc.Id, acc.Type.ToString(), GenerateSlug(acc.Name), acc));\n        }\n    }\n\n    var groupedEvents = events.OrderBy(e => e.ExactTime).GroupBy(e => e.Date).ToList();\n\n    var tripReviews = MockRepository.Reviews\n        .Where(r => r.User?.Id == Model.User?.Id && Model.Destinations.Any(d => d.Id == r.Destination?.Id))\n        .ToList();\n}"},"tool_response":"","tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01KjwZhYcsWqK2japnu7mYSG__vscode-1778152252002","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana"}

--- PreToolUse ---
{"timestamp":"2026-05-07T15:10:25.401Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"a4df2dcc-993d-4fc1-bfe9-e2c0bcc6ecbb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\9e2d08ccc15ca89521ce4530222539be\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\a4df2dcc-993d-4fc1-bfe9-e2c0bcc6ecbb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana\\CUSTOM_ROUTES.md","content":"# Custom Routes Documentation\n\nThis document describes all custom routes implemented in the application to provide URL-friendly navigation.\n\n## Route Summary\n\n### Destinations\n- **List**: `/Destinations` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/Destinations/{country}/{city}`\n  - Example: `/Destinations/Italy/Rome`\n  - Fallback: `/Destinations/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Trips\n- **List**: `/travel` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/travel/{slug}`\n  - Example: `/travel/italy-trip`, `/travel/japan-trip`\n  - Slug is auto-generated from trip name (spaces GĺĆ hyphens, lowercase, special chars removed)\n  - Fallback: `/travel/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Activities\n- **List**: `/activities` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/activities/{activityType}/{activityName}`\n  - Example: `/activities/Food/Sushi-Tour`, `/activities/Sightseeing/Colosseum-Tour`\n  - Activity type uses the enum name (e.g., \"Food\", \"Sightseeing\", \"Party\", \"Relaxation\")\n  - Activity name is converted to slug format\n  - Fallback: `/activities/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Accommodations\n- **List**: `/stays` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/stays/{accommodationType}/{accommodationName}`\n  - Example: `/stays/Hotel/Hotel-Roma`, `/stays/Apartment/Cozy-Studio`\n  - Accommodation type uses the enum name (e.g., \"Hotel\", \"Apartment\", \"Hostel\", \"Villa\")\n  - Accommodation name is converted to slug format\n  - Fallback: `/stays/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Transports\n- **List**: `/Transports` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/Transports/Details/{id}` (still uses ID-based routing)\n\n### Reviews\n- **List**: `/Reviews` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/Reviews/{id}` (ID-based routing)\n- **Recommended Reviews**: `/Reviews/Recommended` (ratings GëŃ 4)\n- **Needs Improvements**: `/Reviews/NeedsImprovements` (ratings < 4)\n\n## URL Slug Generation\n\nSlugs are generated using the following rules:\n1. Convert text to lowercase\n2. Remove special characters (keep only alphanumeric, hyphens, and spaces)\n3. Replace spaces with hyphens\n4. Remove consecutive hyphens\n5. Trim leading/trailing hyphens\n\n### Examples\n- \"Italy Trip\" GĺĆ \"italy-trip\"\n- \"Sushi Tour\" GĺĆ \"sushi-tour\"\n- \"Hotel Roma\" GĺĆ \"hotel-roma\"\n- \"My Awesome Trip!\" GĺĆ \"my-awesome-trip\"\n\n## Route Attributes in Controllers\n\nAll controllers use ASP.NET Core attribute routing:\n- `[Route(...)]` - Sets the base route prefix for the controller\n- `[HttpGet(...)]` - Defines the specific action route\n\n## Backwards Compatibility\n\nAll controllers maintain a fallback route using the legacy `Details/{id}` pattern to ensure existing links and bookmarks continue to work.\n\n## View Integration\n\nViews have been updated to generate correct URLs using Razor helper methods:\n- Index views generate links using the new slug-based routes\n- Slug generation functions are included in each view file\n- Trip Details view dynamically generates correct links for nested events (Activities, Accommodations, Transports)\n\n## Examples\n\n### Destination Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-country=\"Italy\" asp-route-city=\"Rome\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Destinations/Italy/Rome -->\n```\n\n### Activity Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-activityType=\"Food\" asp-route-activityName=\"sushi-tour\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /activities/Food/sushi-tour -->\n```\n\n### Trip Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-slug=\"italy-trip\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /travel/italy-trip -->\n```\n\n### Accommodation Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-accommodationType=\"Hotel\" asp-route-accommodationName=\"hotel-roma\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /stays/Hotel/hotel-roma -->\n```\n\n### Review Filter Links\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Recommended\">Recommended Reviews</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/Recommended -->\n\n<a asp-action=\"NeedsImprovements\">Reviews Needing Improvement</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/NeedsImprovements -->\n```\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01KrNbjiM7xePAKKNfaHPmLZ__vscode-1778152252007","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana"}

--- PostToolUse ---

Example: `/Destinations/Italy/Rome`\n  - Fallback: `/Destinations/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Trips\n- **List**: `/travel` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/travel/{slug}`\n  - Example: `/travel/italy-trip`, `/travel/japan-trip`\n  - Slug is auto-generated from trip name (spaces GĺĆ hyphens, lowercase, special chars removed)\n  - Fallback: `/travel/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Activities\n- **List**: `/activities` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/activities/{activityType}/{activityName}`\n  - Example: `/activities/Food/Sushi-Tour`, `/activities/Sightseeing/Colosseum-Tour`\n  - Activity type uses the enum name (e.g., \"Food\", \"Sightseeing\", \"Party\", \"Relaxation\")\n  - Activity name is converted to slug format\n  - Fallback: `/activities/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Accommodations\n- **List**: `/stays` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/stays/{accommodationType}/{accommodationName}`\n  - Example: `/stays/Hotel/Hotel-Roma`, `/stays/Apartment/Cozy-Studio`\n  - Accommodation type uses the enum name (e.g., \"Hotel\", \"Apartment\", \"Hostel\", \"Villa\")\n  - Accommodation name is converted to slug format\n  - Fallback: `/stays/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Transports\n- **List**: `/Transports` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/Transports/Details/{id}` (still uses ID-based routing)\n\n### Reviews\n- **List**: `/Reviews` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/Reviews/{id}` (ID-based routing)\n- **Recommended Reviews**: `/Reviews/Recommended` (ratings GëŃ 4)\n- **Needs Improvements**: `/Reviews/NeedsImprovements` (ratings < 4)\n\n## URL Slug Generation\n\nSlugs are generated using the following rules:\n1. Convert text to lowercase\n2. Remove special characters (keep only alphanumeric, hyphens, and spaces)\n3. Replace spaces with hyphens\n4. Remove consecutive hyphens\n5. Trim leading/trailing hyphens\n\n### Examples\n- \"Italy Trip\" GĺĆ \"italy-trip\"\n- \"Sushi Tour\" GĺĆ \"sushi-tour\"\n- \"Hotel Roma\" GĺĆ \"hotel-roma\"\n- \"My Awesome Trip!\" GĺĆ \"my-awesome-trip\"\n\n## Route Attributes in Controllers\n\nAll controllers use ASP.NET Core attribute routing:\n- `[Route(...)]` - Sets the base route prefix for the controller\n- `[HttpGet(...)]` - Defines the specific action route\n\n## Backwards Compatibility\n\nAll controllers maintain a fallback route using the legacy `Details/{id}` pattern to ensure existing links and bookmarks continue to work.\n\n## View Integration\n\nViews have been updated to generate correct URLs using Razor helper methods:\n- Index views generate links using the new slug-based routes\n- Slug generation functions are included in each view file\n- Trip Details view dynamically generates correct links for nested events (Activities, Accommodations, Transports)\n\n## Examples\n\n### Destination Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-country=\"Italy\" asp-route-city=\"Rome\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Destinations/Italy/Rome -->\n```\n\n### Activity Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-activityType=\"Food\" asp-route-activityName=\"sushi-tour\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /activities/Food/sushi-tour -->\n```\n\n### Trip Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-slug=\"italy-trip\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /travel/italy-trip -->\n```\n\n### Accommodation Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-accommodationType=\"Hotel\" asp-route-accommodationName=\"hotel-roma\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /stays/Hotel/hotel-roma -->\n```\n\n### Review Filter Links\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Recommended\">Recommended Reviews</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/Recommended -->\n\n<a asp-action=\"NeedsImprovements\">Reviews Needing Improvement</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/NeedsImprovements -->\n```\n"},"tool_response":"","tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01KrNbjiM7xePAKKNfaHPmLZ__vscode-1778152252007","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana"}

DestinationsController (`/Destinations`)\n\n| HTTP Method | URL Pattern | Action | View | Parameters | Description |\n|-------------|------------|--------|------|-----------|-------------|\n| GET | `/Destinations` | `Index` | `Destinations/Index.cshtml` | - | List all destinations |\n| GET | `/Destinations/{country}/{city}` | `Details` | `Destinations/Details.cshtml` | `country` (string), `city` (string) | Destination details by country and city |\n| GET | `/Destinations/Details/{id}` | `DetailsByIdFallback` | `Destinations/Details.cshtml` | `id` (int) | Destination details by ID (fallback, legacy route) |\n\n**Controller Class**: `DestinationsController`\n\n**Route Prefix**: `[Route(\"Destinations\")]`\n\n**Search Matching**: Case-insensitive matching\n\n**Example URLs**:\n- `/Destinations` - All destinations\n- `/Destinations/Italy/Rome` - Destination details for Rome, Italy\n- `/Destinations/Details/1` - Destination with ID 1 (legacy)\n\n---\n\n### 4. ActivitiesController (`/activities`)\n\n| HTTP Method | URL Pattern | Action | View | Parameters | Description |\n|-------------|------------|--------|------|-----------|-------------|\n| GET | `/activities` | `Index` | `Activities/Index.cshtml` | - | List all activities |\n| GET | `/activities/{activityType}/{activityName}` | `Details` | `Activities/Details.cshtml` | `activityType` (enum), `activityName` (slug) | Activity details by type and name |\n| GET | `/activities/Details/{id}` | `DetailsByIdFallback` | `Activities/Details.cshtml` | `id` (int) | Activity details by ID (fallback, legacy route) |\n\n**Controller Class**: `ActivitiesController`\n\n**Route Prefix**: `[Route(\"activities\")]`\n\n**Activity Types**: Food, Sightseeing, Party, Relaxation (enum values)\n\n**Slug Format**: Auto-generated from activity name (e.g., \"Sushi Tour\" GĺĆ \"sushi-tour\")\n\n**Example URLs**:\n- `/activities` - All activities\n- `/activities/Food/sushi-tour` - Food activity: \"Sushi Tour\"\n- `/activities/Sightseeing/colosseum-tour` - Sightseeing activity: \"Colosseum Tour\"\n- `/activities/Details/1` - Activity with ID 1 (legacy)\n\n---\n\n### 5. AccommodationsController (`/stays`)\n\n| HTTP Method | URL Pattern | Action | View | Parameters | Description |\n|-------------|------------|--------|------|-----------|-------------|\n| GET | `/stays` | `Index` | `Accommodations/Index.cshtml` | - | List all accommodations |\n| GET | `/stays/{accommodationType}/{accommodationName}` | `Details` | `Accommodations/Details.cshtml` | `accommodationType` (enum), `accommodationName` (slug) | Accommodation details by type and name |\n| GET | `/stays/Details/{id}` | `DetailsByIdFallback` | `Accommodations/Details.cshtml` | `id` (int) | Accommodation details by ID (fallback, legacy route) |\n\n**Controller Class**: `AccommodationsController`\n\n**Route Prefix**: `[Route(\"stays\")]`\n\n**Accommodation Types**: Hotel, Apartment, Hostel, Villa (enum values)\n\n**Slug Format**: Auto-generated from accommodation name (e.g., \"Hotel Roma\" GĺĆ \"hotel-roma\")\n\n**Example URLs**:\n- `/stays` - All accommodations\n- `/stays/Hotel/hotel-roma` - Hotel: \"Hotel Roma\"\n- `/stays/Apartment/cozy-studio` - Apartment: \"Cozy Studio\"\n- `/stays/Details/1` - Accommodation with ID 1 (legacy)\n\n---\n\n### 6. ReviewsController (`/Reviews`)\n\n| HTTP Method | URL Pattern | Action | View | Parameters | Description |\n|-------------|------------|--------|------|-----------|-------------|\n| GET | `/Reviews` | `Index` | `Reviews/Index.cshtml` | - | List all reviews (filter: All) |\n| GET | `/Reviews/{id}` | `Details` | `Reviews/Details.cshtml` | `id` (int) | Single review details by ID |\n| GET | `/Reviews/Recommended` | `Recommended` | `Reviews/Index.cshtml` | - | List recommended reviews (rating GëŃ 4) |\n| GET | `/Reviews/NeedsImprovements` | `NeedsImprovements` | `Reviews/Index.cshtml` | - | List reviews needing improvements (rating < 4) |\n\n**Controller Class**: `ReviewsController`\n\n**Route Prefix**: `[Route(\"Reviews\")]`\n\n**Filtering**: Reviews are filtered by rating (ViewData[\"CurrentFilter\"] passed to view)\n\n**Example URLs**:\n- `/Reviews` - All reviews\n- `/Reviews/1` - Review with ID 1\n- `/Reviews/Recommended` - Reviews with rating GëŃ 4\n- `/Reviews/NeedsImprovements` - Reviews with rating < 4\n\n---\n\n### 7. TransportsController (`/Transports`)\n\n| HTTP Method | URL Pattern | Action | View | Parameters | Description |\n|-------------|------------|--------|------|-----------|-------------|\n| GET | `/Transports` | `Index` | `Transports/Index.cshtml` | - | List all transport options |\n| GET | `/Transports/Details/{id}` | `Details` | `Transports/Details.cshtml` | `id` (int) | Transport details by ID |\n\n**Controller Class**: `TransportsController`\n\n**Route Prefix**: `[Route(\"Transports\")]`\n\n**Example URLs**:\n- `/Transports` - All transports\n- `/Transports/Details/1` - Transport with ID 1\n\n---\n\n## URL Slug Generation","oldString":"### Trips\n- **List**: `/travel` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/travel/{slug}`\n  - Example: `/travel/italy-trip`, `/travel/japan-trip`\n  - Fallback: `/activities/Details/{id}` (for backwards compatibility)\n\n### Accommodations\n- **List**: `/stays` (default index)\n- **Details**: `/stays/{accommodationType}/{accommodationName}`\n  - Example: `/stays/Hotel/Hotel-Roma`, `/stays/Apartment/Cozy-Studio`\n  - --- PreToolUse ---
{"timestamp":"2026-05-07T15:47:28.993Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"9af38473-53f9-49f5-825e-8ff4efce50c7","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\9e2d08ccc15ca89521ce4530222539be\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\9af38473-53f9-49f5-825e-8ff4efce50c7.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana\\CUSTOM_ROUTES.md","newString":"## Slug Generation Algorithm\n\nImplemented in `TripsController`, `ActivitiesController`, and `AccommodationsController`:\n\n```csharp\nprivate string GenerateSlug(string text)\n{\n    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return \"\";\n    var slug = Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n    slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n    return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n}\n```\n\n**Steps**:\n1. Convert text to lowercase\n2. Remove special characters (keep only alphanumeric, hyphens, and spaces)\n3. Replace spaces with hyphens\n4. Remove consecutive hyphens\n5. Trim leading/trailing hyphens\n\n**Examples**:\n- \"Italy Trip\" GĺĆ \"italy-trip\"\n- \"Sushi Tour\" GĺĆ \"sushi-tour\"\n- \"Hotel Roma\" GĺĆ \"hotel-roma\"\n- \"My Awesome Trip!\" GĺĆ \"my-awesome-trip\"\n- \"Colosseum-Tour\" GĺĆ \"colosseum-tour\"\n\n---\n\n## Backwards Compatibility\n\nAll resource controllers maintain a **fallback route** using the legacy `Details/{id}` pattern to ensure existing links and bookmarks continue to work:\n\n- **Trips**: `/travel/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Destinations**: `/Destinations/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Activities**: `/activities/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Accommodations**: `/stays/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Reviews**: `/Reviews/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `Details` (primary route)\n- **Transports**: `/Transports/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `Details` (primary route)\n\n---\n\n## Route Attributes & Configuration\n\nAll controllers use **ASP.NET Core attribute routing**:\n\n```csharp\n[Route(\"...\")] // Class-level: Sets the base route prefix for the controller\npublic class XyzController : Controller\n{\n    [HttpGet(...)] // Method-level: Defines the specific action route\n    public IActionResult MethodName(string parameter) { ... }\n}\n```\n\n### Route Prefix by Controller\n\n| Controller | Route Prefix | Base URL |\n|-----------|------------|----------|\n| HomeController | (none - default) | `/` |\n| TripsController | `[Route(\"travel\")]` | `/travel` |\n| DestinationsController | `[Route(\"Destinations\")]` | `/Destinations` |\n| ActivitiesController | `[Route(\"activities\")]` | `/activities` |\n| AccommodationsController | `[Route(\"stays\")]` | `/stays` |\n| ReviewsController | `[Route(\"Reviews\")]` | `/Reviews` |\n| TransportsController | `[Route(\"Transports\")]` | `/Transports` |\n\n---\n\n## Entity Relationships & Data Loading\n\nEach Details action uses **eager loading** with `Include()` and `ThenInclude()` to fetch related entities:\n\n### Trips Details\n- Loads: User, Destinations, Activities (per destination), Accommodations (per destination), Transports (per destination), Reviews (per destination)\n\n### Destinations Details\n- Loads: Trip, Activities, Accommodations, Transports, Reviews (with User)\n\n### Activities Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Accommodations Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Reviews Details\n- Loads: User, Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Transports Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n---\n\n## View Integration & URL Generation\n\nViews use **Razor tag helpers** to generate correct URLs:\n\n```html\n<!-- Destination link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-country=\"Italy\" asp-route-city=\"Rome\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Destinations/Italy/Rome -->\n\n<!-- Trip link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-slug=\"italy-trip\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /travel/italy-trip -->\n\n<!-- Activity link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-activityType=\"Food\" asp-route-activityName=\"sushi-tour\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /activities/Food/sushi-tour -->\n\n<!-- Accommodation link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-accommodationType=\"Hotel\" asp-route-accommodationName=\"hotel-roma\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /stays/Hotel/hotel-roma -->\n\n<!-- Review link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"1\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/1 -->\n\n<!-- Transport link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"1\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Transports/Details/1 -->\n```\n\n---\n\n## Common Parameter Matching Rules\n\n| Route Type | Matching | Case Sensitivity | Example |\n|-----------|----------|------------------|---------|\n| Country/City (Destinations) | Exact text match | Case-insensitive | \"Italy\" or \"italy\" matches |\n| Activity Type | Enum name | Case-insensitive | \"Food\" or \"food\" matches Food enum |\n| Activity Name | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Sushi-Tour\" or \"sushi-tour\" matches slug |\n| Accommodation Type | Enum name | Case-insensitive | \"Hotel\" or \"hotel\" matches Hotel enum |\n| Accommodation Name | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Hotel-Roma\" or \"hotel-roma\" matches slug |\n| Trip Slug | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Italy-Trip\" or \"italy-trip\" matches slug |\n| ID-based (numeric) | Numeric ID | Exact | 1, 2, 3, etc. |\n\n---\n\n## Error Handling\n\n- **404 Not Found**: Returned when a resource with matching parameters cannot be found\n- **All failures use**: `return NotFound();` GĺĆ Renders default 404 page\n- **No redirect loops**: Both primary and fallback routes return the same view\n\n---\n\n## Summary of All 7 Controllers & 26 Actions\n\n| # | Controller | Actions | Routes | Views |\n|---|-----------|---------|--------|-------|\n| 1 | HomeController | 3 | 4 URL patterns | 3 views |\n| 2 | TripsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 3 | DestinationsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 4 | ActivitiesController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 5 | AccommodationsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 6 | ReviewsController | 4 | 4 URL patterns | 2 views |\n| 7 | TransportsController | 2 | 2 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| **TOTAL** | **7 Controllers** | **21 Actions** | **23 Unique Patterns** | **14 Views** |\n\n---\n\n## Reference Tables\n\n### HTTP Methods Used\n\n| HTTP Method | Purpose | Used In |\n|------------|---------|---------|\n| GET | Retrieve resources (default for all routes) | All controllers |\n\n### Response Types\n\n| Response Type | When Used | HTTP Status |\n|--------------|-----------|------------|\n| `View(model)` | Render view with model data | 200 OK |\n| `NotFound()` | Resource not found | 404 Not Found |\n\n---\n\n## Examples\n\n### Example 1: Accessing a Destination\n**URL**: `/Destinations/Italy/Rome`\n- **Controller**: DestinationsController\n- **Action**: Details(string country, string city)\n- **Parameters**: country = \"Italy\", city = \"Rome\"\n- **View**: Destinations/Details.cshtml\n- **Data Returned**: Destination object with Trip, Activities, Accommodations, Transports, Reviews\n\n### Example 2: Accessing a Trip by Slug\n**URL**: `/travel/italy-trip`\n- **Controller**: TripsController\n- **Action**: Details(string slug)\n- **Parameters**: slug = \"italy-trip\"\n- **View**: Trips/Details.cshtml\n- **Data Returned**: Trip object with all related Destinations and their nested entities\n\n### Example 3: Filtered Reviews (Recommended)\n**URL**: `/Reviews/Recommended`\n- **Controller**: ReviewsController\n- **Action**: Recommended()\n- **View**: Reviews/Index.cshtml\n- **Filter**: Reviews with rating GëŃ 4, sorted descending by rating\n- **ViewData**: CurrentFilter = \"Recommended\"\n\n### Example 4: Legacy Route (Fallback)\n**URL**: `/travel/Details/5`\n- **Controller**: TripsController\n- **Action**: DetailsByIdFallback(int id)\n- **Parameters**: id = 5\n- **View**: Trips/Details.cshtml (same as slug-based route)\n- **Purpose**: Maintain backwards compatibility","oldString":"## Route Attributes in Controllers\n\nAll controllers use ASP.NET Core attribute routing:\n- `[Route(...)]` - Sets the base route prefix for the controller\n- `[HttpGet(...)]` - Defines the specific action route\n\n## Backwards Compatibility\n\nAll controllers maintain a fallback route using the legacy `Details/{id}` pattern to ensure existing links and bookmarks continue to work.\n\n## View Integration\n\nViews have been updated to generate correct URLs using Razor helper methods:\n- Index views generate links using the new slug-based routes\n- Slug generation functions are included in each view file\n- Trip Details view dynamically generates correct links for nested events (Activities, Accommodations, Transports)\n\n## Examples\n\n### Destination Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-country=\"Italy\" asp-route-city=\"Rome\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Destinations/Italy/Rome -->\n```\n\n### Activity Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-activityType=\"Food\" asp-route-activityName=\"sushi-tour\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /activities/Food/sushi-tour -->\n```\n\n### Trip Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-slug=\"italy-trip\">View Details</a>\n<!-- Generates: /travel/italy-trip -->\n```\n\n### Accommodation Details Link\n```html\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-accommodationType=\"Hotel\" asp-route-accommodationName=\"hotel-roma\">View {"timestamp":"2026-05-07T15:47:30.728Z","hook_event_name":"PostToolUse","session_id":"9af38473-53f9-49f5-825e-8ff4efce50c7","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\9e2d08ccc15ca89521ce4530222539be\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\9af38473-53f9-49f5-825e-8ff4efce50c7.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\Lana\\Documents\\projekti\\Projekt---Aplikacija-za-planiranje-putovanja\\lab-3\\projektLana\\CUSTOM_ROUTES.md","newString":"## Slug Generation Algorithm\n\nImplemented in `TripsController`, `ActivitiesController`, and `AccommodationsController`:\n\n```csharp\nprivate string GenerateSlug(string text)\n{\n    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(text)) return \"\";\n    var slug = Regex.Replace(text.ToLower(), @\"[^a-z0-9\\s-]\", \"\");\n    slug = Regex.Replace(slug, @\"\\s+\", \"-\");\n    return Regex.Replace(slug, @\"-+\", \"-\").Trim('-');\n}\n```\n\n**Steps**:\n1. Convert text to lowercase\n2. Remove special characters (keep only alphanumeric, hyphens, and spaces)\n3. Replace spaces with hyphens\n4. Remove consecutive hyphens\n5. Trim leading/trailing hyphens\n\n**Examples**:\n- \"Italy Trip\" GĺĆ \"italy-trip\"\n- \"Sushi Tour\" GĺĆ \"sushi-tour\"\n- \"Hotel Roma\" GĺĆ \"hotel-roma\"\n- \"My Awesome Trip!\" GĺĆ \"my-awesome-trip\"\n- \"Colosseum-Tour\" GĺĆ \"colosseum-tour\"\n\n---\n\n## Backwards Compatibility\n\nAll resource controllers maintain a **fallback route** using the legacy `Details/{id}` pattern to ensure existing links and bookmarks continue to work:\n\n- **Trips**: `/travel/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Destinations**: `/Destinations/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Activities**: `/activities/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Accommodations**: `/stays/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `DetailsByIdFallback`\n- **Reviews**: `/Reviews/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `Details` (primary route)\n- **Transports**: `/Transports/Details/{id}` GĺĆ Action: `Details` (primary route)\n\n---\n\n## Route Attributes & Configuration\n\nAll controllers use **ASP.NET Core attribute routing**:\n\n```csharp\n[Route(\"...\")] // Class-level: Sets the base route prefix for the controller\npublic class XyzController : Controller\n{\n    [HttpGet(...)] // Method-level: Defines the specific action route\n    public IActionResult MethodName(string parameter) { ... }\n}\n```\n\n### Route Prefix by Controller\n\n| Controller | Route Prefix | Base URL |\n|-----------|------------|----------|\n| HomeController | (none - default) | `/` |\n| TripsController | `[Route(\"travel\")]` | `/travel` |\n| DestinationsController | `[Route(\"Destinations\")]` | `/Destinations` |\n| ActivitiesController | `[Route(\"activities\")]` | `/activities` |\n| AccommodationsController | `[Route(\"stays\")]` | `/stays` |\n| ReviewsController | `[Route(\"Reviews\")]` | `/Reviews` |\n| TransportsController | `[Route(\"Transports\")]` | `/Transports` |\n\n---\n\n## Entity Relationships & Data Loading\n\nEach Details action uses **eager loading** with `Include()` and `ThenInclude()` to fetch related entities:\n\n### Trips Details\n- Loads: User, Destinations, Activities (per destination), Accommodations (per destination), Transports (per destination), Reviews (per destination)\n\n### Destinations Details\n- Loads: Trip, Activities, Accommodations, Transports, Reviews (with User)\n\n### Activities Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Accommodations Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Reviews Details\n- Loads: User, Destination (with Trip)\n\n### Transports Details\n- Loads: Destination (with Trip)\n\n---\n\n## View Integration & URL Generation\n\nViews use **Razor tag helpers** to generate correct URLs:\n\n```html\n<!-- Destination link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-country=\"Italy\" asp-route-city=\"Rome\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Destinations/Italy/Rome -->\n\n<!-- Trip link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-slug=\"italy-trip\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /travel/italy-trip -->\n\n<!-- Activity link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-activityType=\"Food\" asp-route-activityName=\"sushi-tour\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /activities/Food/sushi-tour -->\n\n<!-- Accommodation link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-accommodationType=\"Hotel\" asp-route-accommodationName=\"hotel-roma\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /stays/Hotel/hotel-roma -->\n\n<!-- Review link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"1\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Reviews/1 -->\n\n<!-- Transport link -->\n<a asp-action=\"Details\" asp-route-id=\"1\">View</a>\n<!-- Generates: /Transports/Details/1 -->\n```\n\n---\n\n## Common Parameter Matching Rules\n\n| Route Type | Matching | Case Sensitivity | Example |\n|-----------|----------|------------------|---------|\n| Country/City (Destinations) | Exact text match | Case-insensitive | \"Italy\" or \"italy\" matches |\n| Activity Type | Enum name | Case-insensitive | \"Food\" or \"food\" matches Food enum |\n| Activity Name | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Sushi-Tour\" or \"sushi-tour\" matches slug |\n| Accommodation Type | Enum name | Case-insensitive | \"Hotel\" or \"hotel\" matches Hotel enum |\n| Accommodation Name | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Hotel-Roma\" or \"hotel-roma\" matches slug |\n| Trip Slug | Slug comparison | Case-insensitive slug | \"Italy-Trip\" or \"italy-trip\" matches slug |\n| ID-based (numeric) | Numeric ID | Exact | 1, 2, 3, etc. |\n\n---\n\n## Error Handling\n\n- **404 Not Found**: Returned when a resource with matching parameters cannot be found\n- **All failures use**: `return NotFound();` GĺĆ Renders default 404 page\n- **No redirect loops**: Both primary and fallback routes return the same view\n\n---\n\n## Summary of All 7 Controllers & 26 Actions\n\n| # | Controller | Actions | Routes | Views |\n|---|-----------|---------|--------|-------|\n| 1 | HomeController | 3 | 4 URL patterns | 3 views |\n| 2 | TripsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 3 | DestinationsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 4 | ActivitiesController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 5 | AccommodationsController | 3 | 3 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| 6 | ReviewsController | 4 | 4 URL patterns | 2 views |\n| 7 | TransportsController | 2 | 2 URL patterns | 1 detail view |\n| **TOTAL** | **7 Controllers** | **21 Actions** | **23 Unique Patterns** | **14 Views** |\n\n---\n\n## Reference Tables\n\n### HTTP Methods Used\n\n| HTTP Method | Purpose | Used In |\n|------------|---------|---------|\n| GET | Retrieve resources (default for all routes) | All controllers |\n\n### Response Types\n\n| Response Type | When Used | HTTP Status |\n|--------------|-----------|------------|\n| `View(model)` | Render view with model data | 200 OK |\n| `NotFound()` | Resource not found | 404 Not Found |\n\n---\n\n## Examples\n\n### Example 1: Accessing a Destination\n**URL**: `/Destinations/Italy/Rome`\n- **Controller**: DestinationsController\n- **Action**: Details(string country, string city)\n- **Parameters**: country = \"Italy\", city = \"Rome\"\n- **View**: Destinations/Details.cshtml\n- **Data Returned**: Destination object with Trip, Activities, Accommodations, Transports, Reviews\n\n### Example 2: Accessing a Trip by Slug\n**URL**: `/travel/italy-trip`\n- **Controller**: TripsController\n- **Action**: Details(string slug)\n- **Parameters**: slug = \"italy-trip\"\n- **View**: Trips/Details.cshtml\n- **Data Returned**: Trip object with all related Destinations and their nested entities\n\n### Example 3: Filtered Reviews (Recommended)\n**URL**: `/Reviews/Recommended`\n- **Controller**: ReviewsController\n- **Action**: Recommended()\n- **View**: Reviews/Index.cshtml\n- **Filter**: Reviews with rating GëŃ 4, sorted descending by rating\n- **ViewData**: CurrentFilter = \"Recommended\"\n\n### Example 4: Legacy Route (Fallback)\n**URL**: `/travel/Details/5`\n- **Controller**: TripsController\n- **Action**: DetailsByIdFallback(int id)\n- **Parameters**: id = 5\n- **View**: Trips/Details.cshtml (same as slug-based route)\n- **Purpose**: Maintain backwards compatibility","oldString":"## Route Attributes in Controllers\n\nAll controllers correct URLs using Razor helper methods:\n- Index views generate links using the new slug-based routes\n- Slug generation functions are included in each view file\n- Trip Details view dynamically
